---
title: "EH Internship Report"
author: "Dhanshree Dhrafani"
date: "2025-10-28"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: show
    df-print: paged
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    geometry: [margin=1in]
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
freeze: auto
editor: visual
---
